---
title: "Aunt Charlotte’s Stories of Roman History for the Little Ones."
---

## Aunt Charlotte’s Stories of Roman History for the Little Ones.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1877
**Genre:** Non-fiction: history
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** Marcus Ward & Co., Chandos St, W.C. London; and Royal Ulster Works, Belfast.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
